form.formComment: Having second run back today. Freshened for 41 days. First-up after two months raced on the pace prior to fading finished fifth of 17 starters at Kelso on February 28 over 3200m, 8 len behind Captain Hugo with 74kg at $41. Previously second-up finished fifth of 17 runners at Leopardstown on December 27 over 3218m, 11 len behind Bowensonfire with 74.5kg at $19. Will strip fitter but needs to step forward.

form.formComment: Useful gelding. Resumes off a 34 day letup. Last start finished second of 24 starters at Sandown Park on March 7 over 3220m, on slow going 1.5 len behind Mondo Man carrying 69.5kg at $12. Start before came from midfield; finished sixth of 15 starters at Newbury on February 7 over 3300m, in the wet; 42 len behind Tutti Quanti with 71kg at $15. Has the ability to be in the finish. Sure to be prominent again.
